'''tagada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ivey|ivey]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-g-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ivey|ivey]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tagada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tægædæth|tægædæth]] || [[word:tægædæj|tægædæj]] || [[word:tægædæsh|tægædæsh]] || [[word:tægædæ|tægædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tagagadath|tagagadath]] || [[word:tagagadaj|tagagadaj]] || [[word:tagagadash|tagagadash]] || [[word:tagagada|tagagada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tagadath|tagadath]] || [[word:tagadaj|tagadaj]] || [[word:tagadash|tagadash]] || [[word:tagada|tagada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tagafdath|tagafdath]] || [[word:tagafdaj|tagafdaj]] || [[word:tagafdash|tagafdash]] || [[word:tagafdaf|tagafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tagadatha|tagadatha]] || [[word:tagadaja|tagadaja]] || [[word:tagadasha|tagadasha]] || [[word:tagadaka|tagadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tagadath|tagadath]] || [[word:tagadaj|tagadaj]] || [[word:tagadash|tagadash]] || [[word:tagada|tagada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tagadathal|tagadathal]] || [[word:tagadajal|tagadajal]] || [[word:tagadashal|tagadashal]] || [[word:tagadakal|tagadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tagadathatha|tagadathatha]] || [[word:tagadajaja|tagadajaja]] || [[word:tagadashasha|tagadashasha]] || [[word:tagadaka|tagadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tagadathan|tagadathan]] || [[word:tagadajan|tagadajan]] || [[word:tagadashan|tagadashan]] || [[word:tagadakan|tagadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tagadathaoro|tagadathaoro]] || [[word:tagadajaoro|tagadajaoro]] || [[word:tagadashaoro|tagadashaoro]] || [[word:tagadakaoro|tagadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
